/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -m64 -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -m64 -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/logistics-module.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,liblogistics-module.so -o extensions/liblogistics-module.so "CMakeFiles/logistics-module.dir/LogisticsModule.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logistics-module.dir/agents/CostEstimatorAgent.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logistics-module.dir/agents/DataVerifierAgent.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logistics-module.dir/agents/FileLoaderAgent.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logistics-module.dir/agents/ShopClusteringAgent.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logistics-module.dir/agents/StorageOptimizationAgent.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logistics-module.dir/agents/VariantSelectorAgent.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logistics-module.dir/utils/CsvParser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logistics-module.dir/utils/GeometryUtils.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/home/alexander/.conan2/p/b/sc-ma0fc02a1c6c18e/p/lib /home/alexander/.conan2/p/b/sc-ma0fc02a1c6c18e/p/lib/libsc-agents-common.so /home/alexander/.conan2/p/b/sc-ma0fc02a1c6c18e/p/lib/libsc-memory.so /home/alexander/.conan2/p/b/sc-ma0fc02a1c6c18e/p/lib/libsc-core.so
